caption: A person's hands are seen opening packs of Obsidian basketball trading cards on a table featuring a red and black surface. The scene shifts between close-ups of the card boxes and wide shots of a man wearing a black shirt sitting in a room with electronics and equipment in the background. The boxes are black with the word "OBSIDIAN" printed in a stylized green font. Several boxes are stacked on the table, and the person's hands are shown lifting and manipulating them. A logo for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.com" is visible in the corners of the frames. In the final sequence, the camera focuses on a box showing a basketball player and the text "ULTRA-RARE VIRTUOUS INSERTS!". The man in the background remains seated, observing the process as the boxes are handled.
